name: Model List API
summary: Backend API for listing available AI models and switching session models
goals: Provide the list of available and enabled AI models
Support session model switching via API

specDetail.description: Exposes GET /api/agents/models endpoint returning available models with metadata. PATCH /api/agents/sessions/:sessionId/model endpoint switches the session's model.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Session ID for model switching (required for PATCH)

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: New model ID to switch to (required for PATCH)

constraints: Must only return models that are enabled in the system configuration
Must validate model availability before allowing a switch
Must return model capabilities including context window, supported features, and pricing

acceptanceCriteria.given: the system has configured AI models
acceptanceCriteria.then: a list of available models with name, provider, context window, and pricing is returned

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
